---
title: Posts
listing:
  contents: .
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  fields: [categories, title, subtitle, date, description]
  date-format: MM-DD-YYYY
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
author: ''
comments: false
description: Long Form Posts
title-block-style: none
---
```{=html}
<div class="accordion">
   <div class="accordion-item">
      <h2 class="accordion-header no-anchor" style="
         margin-top: 0px;
         padding-bottom: 0px;
         ">
         <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#collapseOne" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="collapseOne">
         Filter by Themes
         </button>
      </h2>
      <div id="collapseOne" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="headingOne" data-bs-parent="#accordionExample" style="">
         <div class="accordion-body">
            <div class="grid" style="--bs-columns: 3;">
               <div>
                  <div class="card mb-3" style="max-width: 20rem;">
                     <div class="card-body">
                        <img src="theme-images/notion.png" alt="Noion" class="img-fluid card-image">
                     </div>
                     <div class="card-header">Notion</div>
                  </div>
               </div>
               <div>
                  <div class="card mb-3" style="max-width: 20rem;">
                     <div class="card-body">
                        <img src="theme-images/todoist.png" alt="Todoist" class="img-fluid card-image">
                     </div>
                     <div class="card-header">Todoist</div>
                  </div>
               </div>
               <div>
                  <div class="card mb-3" style="max-width: 20rem;">
                     <div class="card-body">
                        <img src="theme-images/apple_shortcuts.png" alt="Apple Shortcuts" class="img-fluid card-image">
                     </div>
                     <div class="card-header">Apple Shortcuts</div>
                  </div>
               </div>
               <!-- <div>
                  <div class="card mb-3" style="max-width: 20rem;">
                     <div class="card-body">
                        <img src="theme-images/twitter.png" alt="Twitter" class="img-fluid card-image">
                     </div>
                     <div class="card-header">Twitter</div>
                  </div>
               </div> -->
               <div>
                  <div class="card mb-3" style="max-width: 20rem;">
                     <div class="card-body">
                        <img src="theme-images/capture.png" alt="Capture" class="img-fluid card-image">
                     </div>
                     <div class="card-header">Capture</div>
                  </div>
               </div>
               <div>
                  <div class="card mb-3" style="max-width: 20rem;">
                     <div class="card-body">
                        <img src="theme-images/organization.png" alt="Tools" class="img-fluid card-image">
                     </div>
                     <div class="card-header">Organization</div>
                  </div>
               </div>
               <div>
                  <div class="card mb-3" style="max-width: 20rem;">
                     <div class="card-body">
                        <img src="theme-images/design.png" alt="Tools" class="img-fluid card-image">
                     </div>
                     <div class="card-header">Design</div>
                  </div>
               </div>
               <div>
                  <div class="card mb-3" style="max-width: 20rem;">
                     <div class="card-body">
                        <img src="theme-images/reading.png" alt="Tools" class="img-fluid card-image">
                     </div>
                     <div class="card-header">Reading</div>
                  </div>
               </div>
                <div>
                  <div class="card mb-3" style="max-width: 20rem;">
                     <div class="card-body">
                        <img src="theme-images/tools.png" alt="Tools" class="img-fluid card-image">
                     </div>
                     <div class="card-header">Tools</div>
                  </div>
               </div>
               <div>
                  <div class="card mb-3" style="max-width: 20rem;">
                     <div class="card-body">
                        <img src="theme-images/tasks.png" alt="Tools" class="img-fluid card-image">
                     </div>
                     <div class="card-header">Tasks</div>
                  </div>
               </div>
                <div>
                  <div class="card mb-3" style="max-width: 20rem;">
                     <div class="card-body">
                        <img src="theme-images/tasks.png" alt="Automation" class="img-fluid card-image">
                     </div>
                     <div class="card-header">Automation</div>
                  </div>
               </div>
              <div>
                  <div class="card mb-3" style="max-width: 20rem;">
                     <div class="card-body">
                        <img src="theme-images/research.png" alt="Research" class="img-fluid card-image">
                     </div>
                     <div class="card-header">Research</div>
                  </div>
               </div>
                <div>
                  <div class="card mb-3" style="max-width: 20rem;">
                     <div class="card-body">
                        <img src="theme-images/note_taking.png" alt="Writing" class="img-fluid card-image">
                     </div>
                     <div class="card-header">Writing</div>
                  </div>
               </div>
            </div>
         </div>
      </div>
   </div>
</div>
```
<br/>
